response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of hands-on software experience spanning web, embedded, low-latency, and full-stack systems, satisfying the raw experience minimum, and recent work on MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure touches the AI focus area. However, his career trajectory has stayed at senior/staff individual-contributor levels on product teams, with no evidence of director-level scope, AI strategy leadership, recognized AI expertise, or shipped AI-powered products or platforms at scale — significant gaps for a principal-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing through talks, workshops, and long-running open-source projects
concerns: No director/principal-level leadership or strategic advisory experience
No recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, or demonstrated AI products at scale
Limited enterprise cloud platform strategy exposure; background skews toward product feature development

key_factors.factor: Lack of principal-level AI strategy and leadership track record
Meets 15-year experience bar with broad technical range
Recent but shallow AI/agentic tooling experience
